warnings: One of 3 views on this page; siblings are the guardrail elevation (_view2_guardrail_elevation.json) and guardrail section (_view3_guardrail_section.json).

This balcony (+3.65) is adjacent to นอน 1 (bedroom 1, +3.75) per the section view on this same sheet -- a 0.10m level step between balcony and bedroom floor, consistent with an exterior-to-interior threshold drop for water management.
